boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Callback date and invoice scope remain unresolved

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact current action boundary. The controlling control record says the callback date and invoice scope are missing, stale, mismatched, or tied to a different action. Policy requires exact source closure before execution. ESCALATE.
